page_content:
HEBR203 Intermediate Hebrew II-A (3 Credits)

Continuation of HEBR211 Study of linguistic structure, further development of audio-lingual, reading, writing, and speaking skills. Reading of texts and newspapers designed to give some knowledge of Hebrew life, thought and culture. Corresponds to the first half of HEBR212.

Prerequisite: HEBR212; or must have placement by the Hebrew coordinator.

Restriction: Must not have completed HEBR212.

Credit Only Granted for: (HEBR203 and HEBR204) or HEBR212.
